title: Living in Boulder vlog 9 - 1 - 2017: Rode 6 hrs. Strava Screen Captures. Peloponesian War.

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps a late-night 6-hour bike ride, a morning doctor/lab appointment, and his daily routine in Boulder. He talks about his diet, sleep schedule, cannabis use, and plans for his riding strategy going forward.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: plans to stop riding before midnight so he can sleep and be more productive
glad he can smoke weed for the first few days of riding
eats oatmeal with protein powder and canned fruit as a staple meal

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder Vlog right now. It's September 1st. I wanted to get started earlier. I was only, so yesterday I rode my bike until midnight after six hours and I stopped because I wanted to try to start getting up earlier, but that didn't work.

I just didn't stop me all night anyway. And then so when I got up late today, I spent the first few hours cleaning my house and then I went and had my stitches removed and they gave me the results. I didn't have cancer. I had the whole thing taken out because I thought I had skin cancer. But at least I know now. Thanks, Obama.

And then I came back here and just got really stoned. I don't have that much weed left. Maybe I can dare to. And then I'll quit because I'm out of money. But I'll be more productive without the weed anyway.

But I'm glad I can smoke weed for the first few days of writing. So my strategy is, oh yeah, so last night, yeah, I'm laying there in bed just with insomnia. So like four in the morning, I went to IHOP because it's the only 24-hour restaurant in Boulder.

And I went to go to the 24-hour restaurant in Boulder at three in the morning, you know, kind of like a rite of passage. So there was a Denny's here, but they closed. They like just closed. One day they just closed. And then so, you know, the newspaper called Denny's headquarters and they didn't answer. Isn't that weird?

Anyway, so, yeah, so, you know, I didn't. And then I got up and I had like a bowl of my oatmeal. It's oatmeal, scoop of protein powder. And the third ingredient is cam fruit. But I didn't have a whole thing, so I got more.
Got to eat it today, though, because I cooked it yesterday. But my appetite's not really that much. But, yeah, so what I'm going to do is my strategy is different today.
I'm not going to ride until midnight and have a stupid, no, right. Because then I'll just have insomnia, you know.
I mean, if I ride enough, then I should be able to sleep, right? So I'll just ride until. Because last night I rode until I was getting kind of hungry.
But this time I'll ride and I'll get hungry and I'll keep riding. And then, so when I get to sleep, I'll go to sleep, even if it's, and just not pay attention to the day.
Yeah, so. Anyways, I think I'm going to get started. I'm still working on the Strava video captures.
Anyways, I'm doing, oh, I'm doing Cyclocross right now. And then it's running. And then after that, I'm going to do the mountain climbing.
And then the history stuff, yeah, just video screen captures for now anyway.
